steps.title: Recognize the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The student needs to emphasize the ORDER in which the two films were released — the chronological sequence from 1933 to 1956.

steps.title: Find the choice that highlights release timing
steps.content:
The correct answer directly emphasizes the release order by stating one was released early in her career and the other came out years later, using temporal language to show the progression.

The other choices focus on different aspects (A on fame, C on the type of roles) or omit one film entirely (D).

That confirms B is correct.
